rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 28, 2014, Line 1: REFEREE'S Motion For Order To Approve Referee'S Return And Report Accounting: GRANTED. Referee to prepare updated order with interest calculated based on grant date of October 28, 2014. (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: VICTOR TUNG VS. AMI QI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 28, 2014, Line 2: PLAINTIFF VICTOR TUNG'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT: CONTINUED to November 20, 2014. Plaintiff failed to provide a courtesy copy of the answer, in violation of local rule 2.6C. Plaintiff shall provide a courtesy copy of the allegedly defective answer to Department 501 by November 10, 2014. Defendant shall submit a courtesy copy of its declaration in opposition to the motion by November 10, 2014 if it wishes the declaration to be considered. (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: NEW PIGALLE LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. ALEXANDER FRAIGE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 28, 2014, Line 3: DEFENDANTS HAYES VALLEY PROPERTIES, ALEXANDER FRAIGE, AMANDA FRAIGE, RICHARD FRAIGE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is MOOT as to causes of action one, four, five and eight, based on the court's granting of the Anti-SLAPP motion. Defendant's Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to all other causes of action except the third, for nuisance. These parties are not owners of the property or parties to the lease agreement, and the complaint does not explain what they are alleged to have done to make them liable parties. The Complaint may be amended to plead facts showing liability on the part of these parties if Plaintiff can do so. The demurrer is OVERRULED as to these parties as to the third cause of action, for nuisance. Defendant's Demurrer as to the Trustee parties is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is MOOT as to causes of action one, four and five and eight, based on the court's granting of the Anti-SLAPP motion. Demurrer is SUSTAINED as to cause of action ten, quiet title, with leave to amend to allege facts to support the claim that Plaintiff has an estate of years interest in the property. Demurrer is otherwise OVERRULED. Complaint sufficiently pleads elements of the other causes of action. (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: NEW PIGALLE LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. ALEXANDER FRAIGE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 28, 2014, Line 3: DEFENDANTS ALEXANDER FRAIGE, AMANDA FRAIGE and RICHARD FRAIGE's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Causes of action one, four, five and eight reference Defendants' filing of an unlawful detainer action, which is a protected activity. Plaintiff fails to submit any admissible evidence of the required elements of these causes of action, in particular of Plaintiff's business relationships with third parties and how they were interfered with by Defendants' conduct, or of the existence of an enforceable contract between the parties. Accordingly, Plaintiff has not carried its burden to show a probability of success on the merits, and causes of action one, four & five and eight are STRICKEN. Cause of action two does not implicate a protected activity and therefore is not the proper object of an Anti-SLAPP motion. (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. DIANA LEMATUA et al

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD FRAIGE et al VS. THE NEW PIGALLE LLC et al
